MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Kirkland Jue is present.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Benjamin Serrano is present.
Attorneys Suzanna Pacht Brickman and Jessica Scheppmann representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May 13, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
